freedomKeys.name: flow03_max_events_per_organizer
freedomKeys.semantics: Maximum active events an organiser can create before the rate-limit path is used.
observableIn: EventCreationOrchestrator returns RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED on the fourth Acme event
Tenant A visual screenshots show three active events per organiser

freedomKeys.name: flow03_max_attendees
freedomKeys.semantics: Maximum attendee cap used when registration compares event capacity with tenant policy.
observableIn: EventRegistrationManager routes the eleventh attendee to the waitlist
Tenant A visual screenshots show a 10-attendee event cap

freedomKeys.name: flow03_promotion_channels
freedomKeys.semantics: Promotion channels emitted by the event promotion service.
observableIn: EventPromotionEngine stores and emits only in-app promotion
Tenant A visual screenshots show in-app promotion only

freedomKeys.name: flow03_campaign_engagement_threshold
freedomKeys.semantics: Engagement count threshold for marking a promotion campaign complete.
observableIn: EventAnalyticsTracker emits PromotionCampaignCompleted when the adapted threshold is reached

chosenAdaptation.reason: This is the smallest safe proof because Flow 03 already reads these values through the flow-scoped configuration surface. The change produces tenant-visible behavior without changing service structure.
